verdict.summary: Guide contains several material inaccuracies around IBANs, Revolut/N26 capabilities, Portuguese tax reporting, crypto taxation, and Russia-sanctions transfer routes.

issues.current: 💳 **Wise карта** (PT IBAN): можно тратить в EUR из мульти-валютного аккаунта
issues.problem: Wise generally does not provide a Portuguese PT IBAN. EUR account details for EU customers are typically non-Portuguese IBANs, and Wise is not a Portuguese bank account substitute. Calling it a “PT IBAN” is misleading for salary, direct debit, and Portuguese entity acceptance issues.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Wise карта: можно тратить EUR из мультивалютного аккаунта; EUR-реквизиты обычно не PT IBAN, а Wise не является португальским банком.”
issues.source: Wise account details / Wise Europe terms

issues.problem: Too broad. Revolut’s Portuguese IBAN availability depends on customer residence/eligibility and migration to the Portuguese branch; it is not “for all” Revolut users globally. The date and universality should not be stated this way without a Revolut Portugal source.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Для клиентов Revolut, зарегистрированных/мигрированных в Португалии, может быть доступен PT IBAN; проверьте в приложении. У нерезидентов или старых аккаунтов может быть LT/другой IBAN.”

issues.problem: Misleading and internally confused. Revolut usually applies its own exchange rate; Standard has fair-use limits and weekend markups/fees may apply. Premium may remove weekday fair-use exchange fees but does not necessarily make weekend exchange “free”.
issues.suggestion: Write: “В будни — близко к межбанковскому/Revоlut rate в пределах лимитов тарифа; на Standard после лимита есть fair-use fee; в выходные обычно применяется дополнительная наценка, в т.ч. на платных тарифах.”
issues.source: Revolut Fees page / Personal Fees Portugal

issues.problem: This is an oversimplification and may be outdated depending on Revolut’s current Portuguese tariff. “Premium unlimited” ignores weekend markup and possible exclusions for exotic/illiquid currencies.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Лимиты зависят от тарифа и страны регистрации; у Standard обычно есть месячный fair-use лимит, у Premium/Metal выше или без weekday fair-use fee, но weekend markup и отдельные комиссии могут сохраняться.”

issues.current: 💱 Конвертация в EUR: бесплатно для держателей
issues.problem: N26 is primarily an EUR bank account and card product; it does not provide a Wise/Revolut-style USD/GBP balance and exchange service for ordinary users. Card spending abroad may be at Mastercard rate with no N26 FX fee, but that is not the same as converting USD/GBP to EUR.
issues.suggestion: Write: “N26: EUR-счёт с DE IBAN; хорош для платежей картой за границей по Mastercard rate, но не замена Wise/Revolut для хранения и конвертации USD/GBP.”

issues.current: ⚖️ Хорош для USD/GBP, не для RUB
issues.problem: Misleading because N26 does not normally let retail users hold USD/GBP balances or convert USD/GBP into EUR like a multi-currency account.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Хорош как EUR-банк и карта; для USD/GBP-конвертации лучше Wise/Revolut/FX broker.”

issues.problem: HiFX is not Lloyds. HiFX became part of Xe/Euronet’s money transfer business. The branding/reference is outdated/confusing.
issues.suggestion: Replace with “Xe Money Transfer / бывший HiFX” or remove the Lloyds reference.

issues.current: ⏱️ 1-3 дня перевод, лучше курс чем wisein для крупных
issues.problem: Typo/unclear wording: “wisein” is not a product name.
issues.suggestion: Write: “лучше курс, чем Wise, для крупных сумм” if that is the intended meaning, with caveat that it depends on quote.

issues.current: ATM в Португалии БЕРУТ ваш курс банка-эмитента (если используете нерезидентскую карту).
issues.problem: Incomplete. Portuguese ATMs may offer Dynamic Currency Conversion; if the user accepts DCC, the ATM/operator rate is used and is usually bad. The advice should explicitly say to decline conversion and choose EUR/local currency.
issues.suggestion: Write: “В ATM всегда отказывайтесь от DCC/‘conversion’ и выбирайте списание в EUR; тогда курс задаёт банк-эмитент/карточная сеть.”
issues.source: Banco de Portugal consumer guidance on ATM/card operations

issues.current: ⚠️ Лимиты на вывоз RUB из РФ: 1 млн USD/год для физлиц
issues.problem: This mixes up Russian capital-control concepts. The well-known restrictions concern cash export in foreign currency equivalents and monthly transfer limits to foreign accounts, not a simple “RUB export limit of 1 million USD/year”. The amount/period is likely wrong and could lead to illegal transfers.
issues.suggestion: Replace with a cautious statement: “Правила РФ по валютным переводам и вывозу наличных часто меняются; отдельно проверяйте лимиты ЦБ РФ/таможни на дату операции. Не путать банковские переводы, переводы на собственные иностранные счета и вывоз наличных.”
issues.source: Central Bank of Russia capital control notices / Russian customs cash export rules

issues.current: ⚠️ ВАЖНО: PT требует декларацию в IRS если оборот >5 000 €/год
issues.problem: False. Portugal does not have a general rule that crypto must be declared only when annual turnover exceeds €5,000. Since the 2023 regime, crypto gains/income may be reportable/taxable depending on the nature of the transaction, holding period, professional activity, staking/mining, etc. A €5,000 turnover threshold is not the general IRS trigger.
issues.suggestion: Write: “В Португалии криптооперации могут попадать в IRS: gains from crypto held <365 days generally taxable at 28% unless aggregated; crypto held ≥365 days may be exempt for qualifying assets; mining/staking/business activity can be Category B/E. Декларирование зависит от типа дохода, а не от общего оборота >5 000 €.”
issues.source: Código do IRS, crypto-asset tax regime introduced by OE 2023; AT guidance

issues.current: 💱 P2P на Binance/Bybit: купить USDT за RUB → продать за EUR (~1% потери)
issues.problem: Misleading for Russian users. Binance exited the Russian market and RUB P2P availability has been restricted/removed. Also presenting crypto as a workaround for sanctions without warning about sanctions compliance and AML/source-of-funds risk is dangerous.
issues.suggestion: Write: “P2P-крипто для RUB сильно ограничено и зависит от биржи/юрисдикции; Binance не является надёжным RUB-P2P маршрутом после ухода из РФ. Любой crypto-to-bank cash-out в ЕС требует документального source of funds и не должен использоваться для обхода санкций.”
issues.source: Binance Russia exit announcement; EU AML/sanctions compliance rules

issues.current: 🏦 РФ банки НЕ под санкциями: Газпромбанк (для энергии), РСХБ (для агро) — частично работают
issues.problem: Factually unsafe. Sanctions status differs by EU/US/UK and changes frequently. Russian Agricultural Bank has been subject to EU sanctions/SWIFT restrictions, and Gazprombank has faced major sanctions/restrictions in some jurisdictions. Stating they are “not under sanctions” is misleading and potentially harmful.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Санкционный статус банков РФ постоянно меняется и зависит от юрисдикции EU/US/UK. Перед любым переводом проверяйте EU Sanctions Map / OFAC / UK HMT and receiving-bank policy; even technically possible transfers may be rejected or frozen.”
issues.source: EU Sanctions Map; Council Regulation (EU) No 833/2014 and amendments; OFAC SDN list

issues.current: 🌐 Юникредит / Райффайзен Россия — работают, но дорогие комиссии (3-5%)
issues.problem: Overconfident. Availability of EUR/USD outbound transfers from Russian subsidiaries has changed repeatedly, with many destination-bank rejections and compliance holds. “Работают” should be qualified heavily.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Иногда возможны переводы через отдельные несанкционные банки/дочки иностранных банков, но доступность, валюты, лимиты, комиссии и acceptance receiving bank меняются; обязательно получать письменный quote/confirmation и проверять банк-получатель.”
issues.source: Bank tariff notices; EU/US sanctions compliance practice

issues.current: ⚖️ **AT декларация**: иностранные счета >50 000 € — обязательная декларация Modelo 38
issues.problem: Wrong form and wrong threshold. Portuguese individual taxpayers generally report foreign bank accounts in IRS Modelo 3, Annex J, quadro 11, regardless of a €50,000 balance threshold. Modelo 38 is not the normal individual annual declaration for foreign accounts.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Иностранные банковские счета налогового резидента PT указываются в IRS Modelo 3, Anexo J, Quadro 11, обычно с IBAN/BIC; это не Modelo 38 и не только при балансе >50 000 €.”
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária — IRS Modelo 3, Anexo J instructions

issues.current: 📊 **PT IRS**: курсовая разница на forex — налогооблагается как «mais-valias» (28%)
issues.problem: Overbroad and misleading. Taxable treatment depends on whether this is actual FX/CFD/trading of financial instruments, business activity, securities disposal, or merely converting personal cash/bank balances for spending. Not every currency conversion gain is automatically a taxable mais-valia at 28%.
issues.suggestion: Write: “FX trading/CFDs/financial instruments can generate taxable income/capital gains, often at 28% or aggregation depending on the case. Ordinary conversion of personal currency balances is a grey/specific area and should be checked with a contabilista; do not assume every exchange-rate movement is automatically declared as mais-valias.”
issues.source: Código do IRS; AT guidance on category G/financial instruments

issues.current: Only generic sources: Banco de Portugal comparador, CMVM, Portal das Finanças homepage
issues.problem: For sensitive tax, crypto, sanctions, and provider-fee claims, the sources are too generic and do not substantiate the specific statements. Portal das Finanças homepage is not a source for Modelo 38/Annex J or crypto taxation.
issues.suggestion: Add specific sources: AT IRS Anexo J instructions; AT/Orçamento do Estado crypto tax guidance; Revolut Portugal Fees; Wise pricing/account details; N26 pricing; EU Sanctions Map and OFAC/UK sanctions list for Russian-bank caveats.
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária; Wise; Revolut; N26; EU Sanctions Map; OFAC

missing_topics: Dynamic Currency Conversion warning at ATMs/card terminals: always choose EUR/local currency, not home-currency conversion
Portuguese IRS reporting of foreign bank accounts via Modelo 3 Anexo J Quadro 11, not Modelo 38
Crypto taxation caveat: 365-day rule, professional activity/mining/staking, and need to document source of funds
Sanctions compliance caveat: crypto/third-country routes must not be used to evade EU/US/UK sanctions; receiving Portuguese banks may freeze funds pending AML review
Provider-specific fee pages should be checked immediately before exchange because Wise/Revolut/N26 tariffs change frequently
IBAN discrimination caveat: EU IBANs should be accepted under SEPA rules, but Portuguese entities may still wrongly insist on PT IBAN
